workLog.action: Selected Issue #1798 (P2, grill-me pattern). Branch feat/1798-autonomous already prepared by harness; no existing PR. Confirmed via gh issue view and gh pr list.

Authored .claude/skills/requirements-interview/SKILL.md (105 lines) implementing the grill-me pattern: design-tree traversal, recommended-answer-per-question discipline, codebase-first lookup, 7-branch checklist, structured PRD output. Frontmatter: name, version, description, model claude-sonnet-4-6, license MIT, user-invocable, triggers.

Wrote .claude/skills/requirements-interview/tests/test_skill_contract.py (10 tests). Validates frontmatter required fields, name regex, description bound, model allowlist, line-count limit, required sections, grill-me/design-tree/recommended-answer/codebase-first invariants. All 10 pass.
Wired skill into .claude/commands/spec.md as new step 2 (after problem clarification, before complexity classification). Renumbered subsequent steps 3..9. Diff confined to Process section.

Validation: skill_frontmatter PASS, skill_size PASS (105 lines / 500 limit), markdownlint-cli2 PASS, pytest 10/10 PASS. Pre-PR --quick fails on environment (Pester scripts not present) and on pre-existing MD040 errors in unrelated agent files (milestone-planner, roadmap, spec-generator) - not introduced by this change.

nextSteps: Atomic commit (3 files: SKILL.md, test, spec.md edit)
Push branch feat/1798-autonomous and open PR linking Fixes #1798
Enable auto-merge subject to required checks
